prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Iron Kingdoms / Full Metal Fantasy inspired steampunk military-fantasy atlas for the terrain type diverse_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: a vast iron-grey sea filled with many island groups and microcontinents, mechanikal factory-islands, steam-vented ruins, blighted marsh chains, warjack assembly ports, arcane storm fronts, fortified naval bases, coal refinery islets, alchemist enclaves, mercenary freeports and rival kingdom outposts.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated Iron Kingdoms atlas, aged parchment with brass-and-iron mechanikal overlay, steam and magic intertwined, warjack smoke plumes, arcane lightning, industrial military fantasy atmosphere.
Composition/framing: tall portrait world map with unevenly distributed island clusters; include large factory islands, tiny mechanik islets, crescent island arcs, oily lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, fragmented cliffs and microcontinents with no grid-like spacing; include brass compass rose, riveted border, sea routes, factory icons, fortress markers and arcane storm symbols without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must vary strongly in size and shape, with realistic complex coastlines, broken shores, curved bays, peninsulas, smoky deltas, blighted estuaries, fjords, volcanic forge ridges and industrial harbors; show many climates and regions including snowbound islands, temperate river isles, blighted swamps, mountain holds, forests, industrial basins and arcane-scorched wastelands.
Avoid: evenly spaced islands, clean heroic fantasy, cheerful tropical palette, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
